headline: One Stock, $10,000, and Decades of Passive Income: This Is It
summary: If you are looking for an attractive yield from a reliable dividend stock, it is hard to beat this monthly dividend payer.

headline: Mizuho Turns More Cautious on Realty Income (O) as Macro Risks Persist
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 5.22%, Realty Income Corporation (NYSE:O) is included among the 10 Best Dividend Stocks with 5%+ Yields and Growing Cash Flows. On May 13, Mizuho lowered its price recommendation on Realty Income Corporation (NYSE:O) to $66 from $68. It reiterated a Neutral rating on the shares. The firm said it continues to […]

headline: Realty Income: Raised Guidance, Higher Growth Expectations Reinforces The Bull Case For Income Investors
summary: Realty Income trades at a discounted 14x forward P/AFFO, below sector median, offering attractive upside as rates decline. Read more on O stock here.
